== Notes for [[Item:Q115467|Q115467]] ==

Ou Vasco Fernandes de Soverosa, Modomo de D. Afonso e de D. Sancho e de sua mulher Teresa Gonçalves…

----------

*http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SPANISH%20NOBILITY%20LATER%20MEDIEVAL.htm#TeresaGilSoverosaMistAlfonsoIXLeon

5. VASCO Gil de Soverosa . The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "D. Vasco Gil, D. Manrique o Enrique Gil, sin hijos, D. Guiomar Gil" as the children of "D. Gil Vazquez de Soverosa" and his second wife "D. Sancha Gonçalez de Orvaneja"[2662].

'''m''' FROILE Fernández, daughter of FERNANDO Yáñez Cheyra & his wife Elvira Méndez. The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "D. Frolle Fernandez, D. Maria Fernandez" as the children of "Fernandeannez Cheyra" and his wife "D. Elvira Mendez", recording in another passage that "D. Vasco Gil" married "D. Froile"[2663]. The Livro Velho records that "D. Fernão Fernandes" married "D. Sancha Velasques filha de D. Vasco Gil de Souerosa e de D. Froilhe Fernandes"[2664]. Vasco & his wife had three children:

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
